title: Modi Goldstein-Rosenfeld
text:
Last compiled: Tue, 09 Jun 2026 21:02:54 -0400


MODI


I’m a fourth-year undergraduate student at Cornell University majoring in computer science. My main interests are in programming languages, systems, and formal methods. I also enjoy game theory and computational approaches to music.




















modigr4@gmail.com Blog Credits

Some ideas I am thinking about writing about:




Implementing print(Hello, World) at the lowest level I can, inspired by this video series: 6502 microprocessor.



Discussing Markov chains in music and the current state of machine learning, including generative AI, in music.



Analyzing the strategy and probability behind Voltorb Flip, a casino-style minigame from one of my favorite games,  Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver .
